$comment: Default compliance rules for the continuous compliance monitor (issue #294, Milestone 10). Rule types: security, trust_chain, artifact_verification. Operators: eq, ne, gte, lte, gt, lt, exists, not_exists, contains, not_contains, in, not_in.

rules.description: Agent must declare a stable identity for traceability.
Agent artifacts must be cryptographically signed.
Unmitigated risk severity must not exceed high.
Agent must not exceed 10 declared permissions.
Agent must not hold admin-scoped permissions.
Agent must publish a version for reproducibility.
